ch1Origin.en:
### Your Body Has Been Collecting «Invisible Weight» for Years

Think back to your teens and twenties. Were you always a bit «bigger» than your friends, even though you didn't eat more? Maybe you were called «big-boned» or «stocky.» You may have noticed that you sweat easily, feel heavy in the morning, get sluggish after meals, and have a coating on your tongue that never quite goes away.

**Phlegm-Dampness isn't about being overweight — it's about fluid metabolism.** In TCM, the Spleen is responsible for transforming food and drink into useful energy and transporting fluids throughout the body. When the Spleen is weak, fluids aren't properly processed. Instead of becoming energy, they become «dampness» — a heavy, sticky, stagnant substance that accumulates everywhere: under the skin (puffiness), in the abdomen (bloatedness), in the head (brain fog), and in the limbs (heaviness).

**The genetic thread.** If your parents carried weight primarily in their abdomen, had high cholesterol, gout, or fatty liver, they may have had Spleen Qi deficiency with Dampness accumulation — and you may have inherited this pattern. In TCM, «constitution» is partly inherited, and Phlegm-Dampness is one of the most family-linked patterns.

**Modern diet is the primary accelerator.** Dairy products (milk, cheese, ice cream), greasy fried foods, excessive sweets, and alcohol all generate massive amounts of dampness in the body. For men with this constitution, the Standard American Diet is essentially a dampness-production machine — every meal adds to the accumulation.

**Sedentary lifestyle compounds it.** Movement is the antidote to stagnation. Hours at a desk, driving instead of walking, and exercising inconsistently all allow dampness to settle and thicken into phlegm. In TCM, «phlegm» is simply congealed, long-standing dampness — it's harder to move and requires more aggressive treatment.

**You may have noticed the pattern without naming it:** a feeling of heaviness in the body, especially in the morning; a thick, greasy coating on the tongue; a tendency to sweat easily but the sweat feels sticky; abdominal bloating after meals; and a preference for sweet, rich foods that seems beyond your control.

**This is Phlegm-Dampness — the «heavy» constitution.** The good news: it responds remarkably well to the right diet, consistent movement, and targeted acupressure. Your body isn't broken — it's just been collecting what it couldn't process. Now it's time to start clearing.
ch1Origin.zh-TW:
### 你的身體已經累積了多年的「隱形重量」

回想你的青少年和二十多歲時期。你是不是總比朋友們「大一號」，即使你吃得並不比他們多？也許你被說過「骨架大」或「壯實」。你可能注意到自己容易出汗、早上起來覺得身體沉重、飯後昏沉想睡，而且舌苔總是厚厚的一層，怎麼刷都刷不掉。

**痰濕質不是單純的肥胖問題——而是水液代謝的問題。** 在中醫理論中，脾負責將飲食轉化為有用的氣血，並運送水液到全身。當脾虛時，水液無法被正常處理，不會變成能量，而是變成「濕氣」——一種沉重、黏膩、停滯的物質，堆積在身體各處：皮下（浮腫）、腹部（脹滿）、頭部（腦霧）和四肢（沉重感）。

**體質的遺傳線索。** 如果你的父母主要是腹部肥胖，有高膽固醇、痛風或脂肪肝，他們可能就有脾虛濕盛的問題——而你可能遺傳了這個體質。在中醫看來，「體質」有部分是先天遺傳的，而痰濕質是與家族關聯最深的體質之一。

**現代飲食是最大的加速器。** 乳製品（牛奶、起司、冰淇淋）、油炸食品、過量的甜食和酒精，都會在體內產生大量濕氣。對於痰濕質的男性來說，標準的美式飲食簡直就是一台「造濕機器」——每一餐都在增加累積。

**久坐不動雪上加霜。** 運動是化解停滯的好幫手。長時間坐在辦公桌前、開車代步、運動不規律，都會讓濕氣沉積並凝結成痰。在中醫裡，「痰」其實就是凝結已久的濕氣——更難排出，需要更積極的調理。

**你也許早已察覺到這些模式，只是沒有命名它：** 身體有沉重感，尤其是早晨；舌苔厚膩；容易出汗但汗液黏膩；飯後腹部脹滿；以及一種似乎難以控制的對甜食和油膩食物的渴望。

**這就是痰濕質——「沉重型」體質。** 好消息是：正確的飲食、持續的運動和針對性的穴位按摩，能帶來非常顯著的改善。你的身體沒有壞掉——只是長期累積了無法代謝的東西。現在是時候開始清理了。
ch1Origin.ja:
### Your Body Has Been Collecting «Invisible Weight»のためにY耳s

Think 背中にyour teensとtwenties. Were you常にa bit «bigger» than your friends,さえthough you didn't 食べる more? Maybe youだったcalled «big-骨d»か«stocky.» You may持っているnoticed that you sw食べる easily,感じるheavyで朝, get sluggish後に食事s,とhave a coating on your 舌 that決してquite goes away.

**Ph足m-Dampness isn't aboutであることover体重 — it's about fluid metabolism.** In 中医, 脾はresponsibleのためにtransforming 食物と飲むにuseful 精力とtransporting 津液 throughout 体. When 脾はweak, 津液 aren't properly processed. Insお茶dのbecoming 精力, they become «湿気» — a heavy, sticky, stagnant substance that accumulates everywhere:下に肌 (puffiness),でお腹 (bloatedness),で頭 (頭がボンヤリする),とin limbs (heaviness).

**The genetic thread.** If your parents carried 体重 primarilyでtheir お腹,持っていた高胆固醇, 痛風,か脂肪ty liver, they may持っているhad 脾 気 deficiencyと共にDampness accumulation —とyou may持っているinherited this pattern. In 中医, «constitution»はpartly inherited,とPh足m-Dampnessはoneのmost family-linked patterns.

**Modern 食事は一次 accelerator.** Dairy products (milk, cheese, ice cream), greasy fried 食物s, excessive sweets,とalcoholすべてgenerate massive amountsの湿気で体. For menと共にthis constitution, Standard American Dietはessentially a 湿気-production machine —毎食事 addsにaccumulation.

**Sedentary 生活方式 compounds it.** Movementはantidoteにstagnation. Hours at a desk, driving insお茶dの散歩ing,とexercising inconsistentlyすべてallow 湿気にsettleとthickenに痰. In 中医, «痰»はsimply congealed, long-standing 湿気 — it's harderにmoveとrequires more aggressive tr食べるment.

**You may持っているnoticed pattern 없이naming it:** a feelingのheavinessで体, especiallyで朝; a thick, greasy coating on 舌; a tendencyにsw食べる easily but sw食べる feels sticky; 腹部的 bloating後に食事s;とa preferenceのためにsweet, rich 食物s that seemsbeyondyour control.

**ThisはPh足m-Dampness — «heavy» constitution.** The良いnews: it responds remarkably wellにright 食事, consistent movement,とtargeted acu圧力. Your 体 isn't broken — it's justあったcollecting何it couldn't process. Now it's timeにstart 清ing.

ch1Emotion.en:
### The Heavy Body Creates a Heavy Mind

Phlegm-Dampness doesn't just affect your body — it creates one of the most distinctive emotional patterns in TCM.

**Brain fog is your baseline.** When dampness accumulates in the head (which it naturally does, being heavy and sinking), it literally clouds your thinking. You may feel like your thoughts move through molasses, that you can't think sharply in the morning, or that mental clarity only arrives in the late afternoon. This isn't ADHD or cognitive decline — it's dampness obstructing the clear orifices.

**Emotional heaviness and «stuckness.»** Dampness is heavy, sticky, and slow. Your emotional life mirrors this: you may feel emotionally «stuck,» unable to generate enthusiasm, and trapped in a low-grade dissatisfaction that doesn't qualify as depression but prevents genuine joy. Things that should excite you barely register.

**The procrastination-dampness loop.** Dampness makes everything feel harder to start. So you procrastinate. Procrastination creates stress. Stress weakens the Spleen. A weaker Spleen produces more dampness. Breaking this loop requires starting with the body — move, sweat, drain the dampness — and the motivation follows.

**Sweet cravings are your body's cry for help, not lack of discipline.** In TCM, the Spleen's associated flavor is sweet. When the Spleen is weak and overloaded with dampness, it sends intense sweet cravings as a distress signal. But sweets create MORE dampness, creating a vicious cycle. Understanding this frees you from guilt — the craving is not a character flaw, it's a symptom.

**Movement is your medicine — and your mood supporternt.** When you exercise enough to sweat, the brain fog lifts, the emotional heaviness lightens, and motivation returns. This isn't endorphins alone — it's dampness being physically moved and expelled through sweat and respiration.
ch1Emotion.zh-TW:
### 沉重的身體造就沉重的心靈

痰濕不僅影響你的身體——它還會形成中醫中最具特色的情緒模式之一。

**腦霧是你的日常基調。** 當濕氣積聚在頭部（濕性本就沉重下沉，自然會往頭部堆積），它確實會蒙蔽你的思維。你可能覺得腦袋像在泥漿裡運轉，早上總是無法清晰思考，或者要到下午才能恢復精神。這不是注意力不足過動症或認知功能衰退——而是濕氣蒙蔽清竅。

**情緒上的沉重感與「卡住的感覺」。** 濕氣沉重、黏膩、遲緩。你的情緒狀態也如出一轍：你可能覺得情緒「卡住了」，無法產生熱情，被困在一種說不上是憂鬱但卻無法真正開心的低度不滿中。那些本該讓你興奮的事，卻激不起一點波瀾。

**拖延症與濕氣的惡性循環。** 濕氣讓你做任何事都覺得難以啟動，於是你開始拖延。拖延帶來壓力，壓力削弱脾的功能，脾更虛就產生更多濕氣。打破這個循環，必須從身體著手——動起來、出出汗、排掉濕氣——動力自然就會跟著來。

**嗜甜是身體的求救訊號，不是意志力薄弱。** 在中醫理論中，脾對應的味道是甘（甜）。當脾虛且濕氣過重時，它會發出強烈的甜食渴望作為求救信號。但甜食會產生更多濕氣，形成惡性循環。理解這一點，你就不必再自責——嗜甜不是性格缺陷，而是一個症狀。

**運動是你的好幫手——也是你的抗憂鬱劑。** 當你運動到出汗的程度，腦霧消散、情緒的沉重感減輕、動力也隨之回來。這不僅僅是腦內啡的作用——更是濕氣被實質性地排出體外，透過汗水和呼吸代謝出去。
ch1Emotion.ja:
### The Heavy Body Cr食べるes a Heavy Mind

Ph足m-Dampness doesn'tただaffect your 体 — it cr食べるes oneのmost distinctive emotional patternsで中医.

**Brain fogはyour baseline.** When 湿気 accumulatesで頭 (which it naturally does,であることheavyとsinking), it literally clouds your thinking. You may感じるlike your thoughts moveを通じてmolasses, that you can't考えるsharplyで朝,かthat mental clarityのみarrivesでlate 午後. This isn't ADHDかcognitive decline — it's 湿気 obstructing 清 orifices.

**Emotional heavinessと«stuckness.»** Dampnessはheavy, sticky,とslow. Your emotionallifemirrors this: you may感じるemotionally «stuck,» unableにgenerate enthusiasm,とtrappedでa low-grade dissatisfaction that doesn't qualify as 抑郁症 but 予防s genuine 喜び. Things thatすべきexcite you barely register.

**The procrastination-湿気 loop.** Dampness makes everything感じるharderにstart. So you procrastinate. Procrastination cr食べるes ストレス. Stress weakens 脾. A weaker 脾 produces more 湿気. Breaking this loop requires startingと共に体 — move, sw食べる, 利 湿気 —とmotivation follows.

**Sweet cravingsはyour 体's cryのためにヘルプ,ないlackのdiscipline.** In 中医, 脾's associated flavorはsweet. When 脾はweakとoverloadedと共に湿気, it sends intense sweet cravings as a diストレス signal. But sweets cr食べるe MORE 湿気, cr食べるing a vicious cycle. Understanding this frees youからguilt — cravingはnot acharacterflaw, it's a 症状.

**Movement is your wellness —とyour mood supporternt.** When you 運動 enoughにsw食べる, 頭がボンヤリする lifts, emotional heaviness lightens,とmotivation returns. This isn't endorphins alone — it's 湿気であることphysically movedとexpelledを通じてsw食べると呼吸.

ch2Combos.en: **Dairy + sweets (dessert habit)** — The single worst combination for Phlegm-Damp types. Dairy (milk, cheese, cream) is the most damp-producing food category in TCM. Combined with sweets (which also generate dampness and damage the Spleen), this creates a massive dampness burden that your already-weak Spleen cannot process. Result: bloating, weight gain around the abdomen, and worsening brain fog.
ch2Combos.zh-TW: **乳製品＋甜食（飯後甜點習慣）**——痰濕質最忌諱的飲食組合。乳製品（牛奶、起司、鮮奶油）在中醫裡是最容易生濕的食物類別。搭配甜食（同樣會生濕並傷脾），會製造出巨大的濕氣負擔，讓你本來就虛弱的脾完全無法處理。結果就是：腹脹、腹部肥胖加劇、腦霧越來越嚴重。
ch2Combos.ja: **Dairy + sweets (dessert 習慣)** — The single最悪のcombinationのためにPh足m-Damp types. Dairy (milk, cheese, cream)はmost damp-producing 食物 categoryで中医. Combinedと共にsweets (whichもgenerate 湿気とdamage 脾), this cr食べるes a massive 湿気 burden that your already-weak 脾 cannot process. Result: bloating, 体重gainaround お腹,とworsening 頭がボンヤリする.

ch2Combos.en: **Beer + fried food** — Beer is damp-heat; fried food is pure dampness. Together they create a «damp-heat bomb» that settles in the lower body. For men with this constitution, regular beer-and-fried-food consumption leads to abdominal obesity, gout, and that characteristic «beer belly» that's actually a dampness accumulation, not just fat.
ch2Combos.zh-TW: **啤酒＋油炸食物**——啤酒是濕熱之品，油炸食物則是純粹的濕氣。兩者結合形成一顆「濕熱炸彈」，沉積在下半身。對痰濕質男性來說，經常啤酒配炸物會導致腹部肥胖、痛風，以及那個標誌性的「啤酒肚」——那其實是濕氣堆積，不只是脂肪。
ch2Combos.ja: **Beer + fried 食物** — Beerはdamp-熱; fried 食物はpure 湿気. Together they cr食べるe a «damp-熱 bomb» that settlesでlower 体. For menと共にthis constitution, regular beer-and-fried-食物 consumption leadsに腹部的 obesity, 痛風,とthat characteristic «beer belly» that's actually a 湿気 accumulation,ないjust 脂肪.

ch2Combos.en: **Cold drinks + heavy meals** — Cold beverages slow Spleen function dramatically, while heavy meals overwhelm the Spleen's processing capacity. Together they create a situation where food sits in your stomach like a stone, generating dampness instead of energy. The characteristic post-meal bloating and drowsiness is your Spleen shutting down under the combined burden.
ch2Combos.zh-TW: **冷飲＋大魚大肉**——冰冷的飲料會大幅降低脾的運作功能，而油膩的豐盛餐點則讓脾的處理能力超載。兩者加在一起，食物就像一塊石頭堵在胃裡，不僅無法轉化為能量，反而持續生濕。飯後那種腹脹和昏沉想睡的感覺，就是脾在雙重負擔下罷工的表現。
ch2Combos.ja: **Cold 飲むs + heavy 食事s** — Cold beverages slow 脾 function dramatically,の間にheavy 食事s overwhelm 脾's processing capacity. Together they cr食べるe a situationどこ食物 sitsでyour stomachlikea stone, generating 湿気 insお茶dの精力. The characteristic post-食事 bloatingとdrowsinessはyour 脾 shutting down下にcombined burden.

ch2Combos.en: **Excessive fruit + meals** — Fruit is healthy in moderation, but eating large quantities with meals adds water-weight to an already damp system. The natural sugars in fruit also generate dampness when consumed in excess. For Phlegm-Damp types, fruit should be a between-meals snack in small quantities, never a meal component.
ch2Combos.zh-TW: **過量水果＋正餐**——水果適量吃是健康的，但大量搭配正餐吃，等於給已經濕氣過重的身體再灌水。水果中的天然糖分攝取過量也會生濕。對痰濕質來說，水果應該在兩餐之間少量食用當作點心，絕不能當作正餐的一部分。
ch2Combos.ja: **Excessive fruit + 食事s** — Fruitは健康yでmoderation, but 食べるing大きいquantitiesと共に食事s adds 水-体重にan already damp system. The natural sugarsでfruitもgenerate 湿気るときconsumedでexcess. For Ph足m-Damp types, fruit shouldであるa between-食事s 間食でsmall quantities,決してa 食事 component.

ch2Combos.en: **Late-night eating + alcohol** — Digestion at night is naturally slower. Eating a heavy meal and drinking alcohol before bed means the food barely digests, creating dampness that accumulates overnight. This is why you wake up feeling heavy, puffy, and groggy — your body spent the night generating dampness instead of resting.
ch2Combos.zh-TW: **宵夜＋飲酒**——夜間消化功能本來就會自然減弱。睡前吃大餐又喝酒，食物幾乎無法消化，整晚都在製造濕氣。這就是為什麼你早上醒來覺得身體沉重、浮腫、昏昏沉沉——你的身體整晚都在造濕，而不是在休息。
ch2Combos.ja: **Late-夜 食べるing + alcohol** — Digestion at 夜はnaturally slower. Eating a heavy 食事と飲むing alcohol前にbedmeans食物 barely digests, cr食べるing 湿気 that accumulates over夜. This isなぜyou 目覚める感情heavy, puffy,とgroggy — your 体spent夜 generating 湿気 insお茶dの休息ing.

spring.en: Chen Pi (Aged Tangerine Peel) Tea — 5g aged tangerine peel, steeped in hot water 10 minutes. The classic dampness-drinking tea. Moves Qi, transforms phlegm, and supports the Spleen. Drink after meals.
spring.zh-TW: 陳皮茶——取陳皮 5 公克，以熱水沖泡 10 分鐘。這是痰濕質最經典的日常茶飲。能理氣化痰、健脾助消化。建議飯後飲用。
spring.ja: Chen Pi (Aged T怒りine Peel) Tea — 5g aged t怒りine peel, steepedでhot 水 10 分s. The classic 湿気-飲むing お茶. Moves 気, transforms 痰,とサポートs 脾. Drink後に食事s.

summer.en: Coix Seed & Hawthorn Tea — 20g roasted coix seeds + 10g dried hawthorn, simmered 15 minutes. Coix seed drains dampness; hawthorn digests fats and resolves food stagnation. The perfect summer tea for Phlegm-Damp types who feel sluggish in humid weather.
summer.zh-TW: 炒薏米山楂茶——炒薏米 20 公克＋乾山楂 10 公克，煮 15 分鐘。薏米祛濕利水，山楂消脂化積。潮濕悶熱的夏天感到身體沉重時，這杯茶是痰濕質的絕佳選擇。
summer.ja: Coix Seed & Hawthorn Tea — 20g roasted coix seeds + 10g dried hawthorn, simmered 15 分s. Coix seed 利s 湿気; hawthorn digests 脂肪sとresolves 食物 stagnation. The perfect 夏 お茶のためにPh足m-Damp types誰feel sluggishでhumid w食べるher.

autumn.en: Poria & Barley Damp-Draining Tea — 15g poria + 20g roasted barley, simmered 20 minutes. Gentle, daily dampness-draining tea that supports the Spleen without being too cold. Drink warm throughout the day.
autumn.zh-TW: 茯苓炒大麥祛濕茶——茯苓 15 公克＋炒大麥 20 公克，煮 20 分鐘。性質溫和的日常祛濕茶飲，健脾而不寒涼。全天溫熱飲用皆宜。
autumn.ja: Poria & Barley Damp-Draining Tea — 15g poria + 20g roasted barley, simmered 20 分s. Gentle,毎日の湿気-利ing お茶 that サポートs 脾 없이beingもcold. Drink 温める throughout 日.

winter.en: Ginger, Tangerine Peel & Brown Sugar Tea — 3 slices ginger + 5g aged tangerine peel + 1 tbsp brown sugar, simmered 10 minutes. Warms the Spleen, moves Qi, and gently transforms phlegm. Winter is when dampness congeals into harder phlegm — this warming tea keeps things moving.
winter.zh-TW: 生薑陳皮黑糖茶——生薑 3 片＋陳皮 5 公克＋黑糖 1 大匙，煮 10 分鐘。溫脾理氣、溫和化痰。冬季濕氣容易凝結成更黏稠的痰，這杯暖茶能讓氣血保持流通。
winter.ja: Ginger, T怒りine Peel & Brown Sugar Tea — 3 slices ginger + 5g aged t怒りine peel + 1 tbsp brown sugar, simmered 10 分s. W腕s 脾, moves 気,とgently transforms 痰. Winter isるとき湿気 congealsにharder 痰 — this 温めるing お茶 keeps things moving.

spring.en: Spring is your opportunity to start clearing accumulated winter dampness. Increase movement, eat lighter meals, and drink Chen Pi tea daily. The Liver's rising energy in spring naturally helps move stagnant Qi — support this with morning exercise.
spring.zh-TW: 春季是開始清除冬季累積濕氣的好時機。增加運動量、飲食清淡，每天喝陳皮茶。春季肝氣升發，自然有助於疏通停滯的氣機——搭配晨間運動效果更佳。
spring.ja: Springはyour opportunityにstart 清ingaccumulated冬 湿気. Increase movement, 食べる lighter 食事s,と飲む Chen Pi お茶 daily. The 肝's rising 精力で春 naturally ヘルプs動くstagnant 気 — サポート thisと共に朝 運動.

summer.en: Summer humidity is your kryptonite. External dampness (humidity) reinforces your internal dampness, making you feel the heaviest and slowest of the year. Stay in air-conditioned environments during peak humidity, drink warm damp-draining teas, and avoid ice-cold beverages that further slow your Spleen.
summer.zh-TW: 夏季潮濕是你最大的剋星。外在的濕氣（高濕度）會加重體內的濕氣，讓你一年中此時感覺最沉重、最遲鈍。在濕度最高的時段待在冷氣房，飲用溫熱的祛濕茶飲，避免冰品冷飲，以免進一步拖累脾胃功能。
summer.ja: Summer humidityはyour kryptonite. External 湿気 (humidity) reinforces your 内側の 湿気, making you感じるheaviestとslowestの年. Stayでair-状態ed environmentsの間にpeak humidity, 飲む 温める damp-利ing お茶s,と避ける ice-cold beverages that further slow your 脾.

autumn.en: Autumn's dryness is actually helpful for you — it naturally begins to dry out some of your internal dampness. Continue damp-draining foods but begin adding gentle moistening foods (pears, lily bulb) so you don't swing too far in the other direction. This is a transition season of balance.
autumn.zh-TW: 秋季的燥氣其實對你有幫助——它自然地開始帶走體內部分濕氣。繼續食用祛濕食物，但可以開始適量加入溫和的潤燥食材（水梨、百合），以免走向另一個極端。這是一個調和過渡的季節。
autumn.ja: Autumn's 乾燥はactually ヘルプfulのためにyou — it naturally beginsにdry out someのyour 内側の 湿気. Continue damp-利ing 食物s but begin adding gentle 潤すing 食物s (p耳s, lily bulb) so you don't swingもfarでother direction. Thisはa transition seasonのバランス.

winter.en: Winter is when dampness congeals into phlegm — it becomes harder, more entrenched. Keep moving daily (even indoor exercise counts), avoid excessive rich foods at holiday gatherings, and drink warming damp-transforming teas. The biggest mistake Phlegm-Damp men make in winter is becoming completely sedentary and eating heavy comfort foods.
winter.zh-TW: 冬季是濕氣凝結成痰的季節——痰變得更硬、更頑固。每天保持運動（室內運動也算），節日聚餐時避免過量油膩食物，飲用溫性的化痰茶飲。痰濕質男性在冬天最大的錯誤就是完全不動，又大吃大喝豐盛的進補食物。
winter.ja: Winter isるとき湿気 congealsに痰 — it becomes harder, more entrenched. Keep moving毎日の(even indoor 運動 counts), 避ける excessive rich 食物s at holi日 gatherings,と飲む 温めるing damp-transforming お茶s. The biggest mistake Ph足m-Damp男性makeで冬はbecoming completely sedentaryと食べるing heavy comfort 食物s.

ch4Acupoints.en:
**Zusanli (足三里) — Leg Three Miles**
Location: 4 finger-widths below kneecap, 1 finger-width outside shinbone.
Method: Press firmly for 3 minutes each leg, morning and evening.
Effect: The #1 point for strengthening the Spleen and Stomach. A strong Spleen transforms dampness efficiently. This point is the foundation of all Phlegm-Damp care — press it daily and you may notice digestion improvements within weeks.
ch4Acupoints.zh-TW:
**足三里——胃經合穴**
位置：膝蓋骨下方四橫指，脛骨外側一橫指處。
方法：每天早晚各按壓雙腿各 3 分鐘，力度適中。
功效：健脾和胃的第一要穴。脾氣健運，則濕氣自化。此穴位是所有痰濕調理的基礎——每天按壓，兩週內消化功能就會明顯改善。
ch4Acupoints.ja:
**Zusanli (足三里) — Leg Three Miles**
Location: 4 finger-widths below kneecap, 1 finger-widthoutsideshin骨.
Method: Press firmlyのために3 分s各足, 朝と夜.
Effect: The #1 pointのために強化ing 脾と胃. A strong 脾 transforms 湿気 efficiently. This pointはfoundationのall Ph足m-Damp tr食べるment — press it dailyとyour digestionするnoticeably 改善within2 週s.

ch4Acupoints.en:
**Fenglong (丰隆) — Abundant Bulge**
Location: Midpoint between the kneecap and the outer ankle bone, on the outer side of the shin muscle.
Method: Press firmly for 3 minutes each leg, once daily.
Effect: THE phlegm-resolving point in TCM. Fenglong is the Luo-connecting point of the Stomach meridian, and it specifically transforms phlegm and drains dampness. For men with abdominal obesity, thick tongue coating, and a feeling of heaviness, this point is transformative.
ch4Acupoints.zh-TW:
**豐隆——胃經絡穴**
位置：膝蓋骨與外踝連線的中點，小腿外側脛骨前肌上。
方法：每天按壓雙腿各 3 分鐘，力度適中。
功效：中醫第一化痰要穴。豐隆是胃經的絡穴，專門化痰祛濕。對於腹部肥胖、舌苔厚膩、身體沉重的痰濕質男性，此穴效果顯著。
ch4Acupoints.ja:
**Fenglong (丰隆) — Abundant Bulge**
Location: Midpointの間にkneecapとouter ankle 骨, on outer sideのshin 筋肉.
Method: Press firmlyのために3 分s各足, once daily.
Effect: THE 痰-resolving pointで中医. FenglongはLuo-connecting pointの胃 meridian,とit specifically transforms 痰と利s 湿気. For menと共に腹部的 obesity, thick 舌 coating,とa feelingのheaviness, this pointはtransformative.

ch4Acupoints.en:
**Yinlingquan (阴陵泉) — Yin Mound Spring**
Location: On the inner leg, just below the knee, in the depression below the inner knee bone.
Method: Press firmly for 2-3 minutes each side, once daily.
Effect: The primary point for draining dampness from the body. It strengthens the Spleen's ability to transport fluids and resolves water retention, bloating, and that heavy-leg feeling. Combine with Fenglong for a powerful dampness-draining pair.
ch4Acupoints.zh-TW:
**陰陵泉——脾經合穴**
位置：小腿內側，膝蓋下方，脛骨內側髁後下方的凹陷處。
方法：每天按壓雙側各 2-3 分鐘，力度適中。
功效：祛濕的第一要穴。能增強脾的運化水濕能力，改善水腫、腹脹和下肢沉重感。搭配豐隆穴同時使用，祛濕效果加倍。
ch4Acupoints.ja:
**陰lingquan (阴陵泉) — 陰 Mound Spring**
Location: On inner 足,ただbelow knee,で抑郁症 below inner knee 骨.
Method: Press firmlyのために2-3 分s各side, once daily.
Effect: The 一次 pointのために利ing 湿気から体. It 強化s 脾's abilityにtransport 津液とresolves 水 retention, bloating,とthat heavy-足 feeling. Combineと共にFenglongのためにa powerful 湿気-利ing pair.

ch4Acupoints.en:
**Zhongwan (中脘) — Middle Cavity**
Location: Midline of the abdomen, halfway between the navel and the bottom of the sternum.
Method: Use warm palm, rub clockwise for 5 minutes after meals.
Effect: The Front-Mu point of the Stomach — directly strengthens digestive function, resolves food stagnation, and reduces the bloating that Phlegm-Damp men experience after eating. This is the point to press when you feel «stuffed» after a meal.
ch4Acupoints.zh-TW:
**中脘——胃之募穴**
位置：腹部正中線，肚臍與胸骨下端連線的中點。
方法：飯後以溫熱的掌心順時針揉按 5 分鐘。
功效：胃的募穴——直接增強消化功能，化解食積，減輕痰濕質男性飯後常見的腹脹感。飯後覺得「撐住了」的時候，按這個穴位就對了。
ch4Acupoints.ja:
**Zhongwan (中脘) — Middle Cavity**
Location: Midlineのお腹, halfwayの間にnavelとbottomのsternum.
Method: Use 温める palm, rub clockwiseのために5 分s後に食事s.
Effect: The Front-Mu pointの胃 — directly 強化s digestive function, resolves 食物 stagnation,と軽減s bloating that Ph足m-Damp男性experience後に食べるing. Thisはpointにpressるときyou感じる«stuffed»後にa 食事.

ch4Acupoints.en:
**Tianshu (天枢) — Heavenly Pivot**
Location: 2 thumb-widths to either side of the navel.
Method: Press both points simultaneously with warm hands for 3 minutes, morning and evening.
Effect: Regulates the intestines and transforms dampness in the abdomen. For men with abdominal bloating, irregular bowel movements, and the characteristic «damp belly," this point helps restore normal digestive rhythm and reduce girth.
ch4Acupoints.zh-TW:
**天樞——大腸募穴**
位置：肚臍左右兩側各兩拇指寬處。
方法：每天早晚以溫熱雙手同時按壓兩側穴位各 3 分鐘。
功效：調理腸胃、化解腹部濕氣。對於腹部脹滿、排便不規律和典型的「痰濕肚」男性，此穴位有助於恢復正常的消化節奏、減少腰圍。
ch4Acupoints.ja:
**Tianshu (天枢) — Heavenly Pivot**
Location: 2 thumb-widthsにeither sideのnavel.
Method: Press両方的points simultaneouslyと共に温める 手sのために3 分s, 朝と夜.
Effect: Regulates intestinesとtransforms 湿気でお腹. For menと共に腹部的 bloating, irregular bowel movements,とcharacteristic «damp belly," thispointヘルプs 休息ore normal digestive rhythmと軽減 girth.

title.en: Coix Seed, Poria & Red Bean Damp-Draining Soup
title.zh-TW: 薏米茯苓赤小豆祛濕湯
title.ja: Coix Seed, Poria & Red Bean Damp-Draining Soup

ch6Recipes.titleZh: 薏米茯苓赤小豆祛湿汤

tcmPrinciple.en: The classic dampness-draining formula in food therapy. Coix seed (roasted to reduce coldness) and adzuki beans are the two most powerful damp-draining foods in TCM. Poria strengthens the Spleen while draining dampness. Tangerine peel moves Qi to prevent stagnation. This soup directly addresses the core mechanism of Phlegm-Dampness: a weak Spleen generating dampness that accumulates as «invisible weight.»
tcmPrinciple.zh-TW: 食療中最經典的祛濕方。炒薏米（乾炒以減少寒性）和赤小豆是中醫祛濕最強的兩味食材。茯苓健脾滲濕，陳皮理氣以防氣機停滯。這道湯直接針對痰濕質的核心病機：脾虛生濕，濕聚成痰，表現為「隱形的重量」。
tcmPrinciple.ja: The classic 湿気-利ing formulaで食物 therapy. Coix seed (roastedに軽減 coldness)とadzuki beansはtwomostpowerful damp-利ing 食物sで中医. Poria 強化s 脾の間に利ing 湿気. T怒りine peel moves 気に予防 stagnation. This スープ directly addresses core mechanismのPh足m-Dampness: a weak 脾 generating 湿気 that accumulates as «invisible 体重.»

steps.en: Dry-roast coix seeds in a pan for 5 minutes until fragrant and slightly golden. Soak adzuki beans for 2 hours.
steps.zh-TW: 將薏米放入乾鍋中翻炒 5 分鐘至微黃出香。赤小豆提前浸泡 2 小時。
steps.ja: Dry-roast coix seedsでa panのために5 分sまでfragrantとslightly golden. Soak adzuki beansのために2 時間s.

steps.en: Blanch pork ribs for 2 minutes. Rinse.
steps.zh-TW: 豬排骨汆燙 2 分鐘後沖洗乾淨。
steps.ja: Blanch pork ribsのために2 分s. Rinse.

steps.en: Place all ingredients in a pot with 1.5 liters of water. Bring to boil.
steps.zh-TW: 所有材料放入鍋中，加水 1.5 公升，大火煮開。
steps.ja: Placeすべて材料sでa potと共に1.5 litersの水. Bringにboil.

steps.en: Simmer on low heat for 1.5 hours until beans are soft.
steps.zh-TW: 轉小火煲 1.5 小時，至豆子軟爛。
steps.ja: Simmer on低い熱のために1.5 時間sまでbeansはsoft.

steps.en: Season with salt. Eat the beans and coix seeds — they are the medicine. The broth carries the poria's damp-draining properties.
steps.zh-TW: 加鹽調味。豆子和薏米要吃掉——它們才是養生功效所在。湯汁則承載了茯苓的祛濕精華。
steps.ja: Seasonと共にsalt. Eat beansとcoix seeds — they are wellness foods. The broth carries poria's damp-利ing properties.

tip.en: The #1 soup for your constitution. Use ADZUKI beans (赤小豆), NOT regular red beans (红豆) — they look similar but adzuki is specifically for dampness. Roast the coix seeds (dry pan, 5 min) to reduce their cold nature. Drink 3-4 times per week.
tip.zh-TW: 痰濕質的首要湯品。請使用赤小豆，不是普通的紅豆——兩者外觀相似，但赤小豆才專門用於祛濕。薏米一定要先乾炒（5 分鐘）以減少寒性。每週飲用 3-4 次。
tip.ja: The #1 スープのためにyour constitution. Use ADZUKI beans (赤小豆), NOT regular red beans (红豆) — they見るsimilar but adzukiはspecificallyのために湿気. Roast coix seeds (dry pan, 5 min)に軽減 their冷たいnature. Drink 3-4倍per 週.

tcmPrinciple.en: Winter melon is one of the most effective damp-draining foods in TCM — it promotes urination, clears heat, and resolves water retention. Combined with ginger (which warms the Spleen so it can process dampness) and tangerine peel (which moves Qi), this is a summer-weight-loss soup that actually addresses the root cause.
tcmPrinciple.zh-TW: 冬瓜是中醫最有效的利濕食物之一——能利尿清熱、消除水腫。搭配生薑（溫脾以助運化濕氣）和陳皮（理氣），這是一道真正從根本著手的夏日消脂湯品。
tcmPrinciple.ja: Winter melonはoneのmost effective damp-利ing 食物sで中医 — it promotes urination, 清s 熱,とresolves 水 retention. Combinedと共にginger (which 温めるs 脾 so itできるprocess 湿気)とt怒りine peel (which moves 気), thisはa 夏-体重-loss スープ that actually addresses root cause.

steps.en: Cut winter melon into large chunks with skin on (the skin enhances damp-draining). Roast coix seeds.
steps.zh-TW: 冬瓜連皮切大塊（冬瓜皮利濕效果更好）。炒薏米備用。
steps.ja: Cut 冬 melonにlarge chunksと共に肌 on (肌 enhances damp-利ing). Roast coix seeds.

steps.en: Blanch pork ribs for 2 minutes. Rinse.
steps.zh-TW: 豬排骨汆燙 2 分鐘後沖洗乾淨。
steps.ja: Blanch pork ribsのために2 分s. Rinse.

steps.en: Place ribs, ginger, tangerine peel, and coix seed in a pot with 1.2 liters of water. Simmer for 1 hour.
steps.zh-TW: 排骨、生薑、陳皮和薏米放入鍋中，加水 1.2 公升，小火煲 1 小時。
steps.ja: Place ribs, ginger, t怒りine peel,とcoix seedでa potと共に1.2 litersの水. Simmerのために1 時間.

steps.en: Add winter melon and cook 20 minutes until translucent. Season with salt.
steps.zh-TW: 加入冬瓜再煮 20 分鐘至半透明狀，加鹽調味。
steps.ja: Add 冬 melonと料理する 20 分sまでtranslucent. Seasonと共にsalt.

tip.en: Especially effective in summer when dampness is at its peak. Keep the winter melon skin — it's the most therapeutic part. This light soup can be consumed 3-4 times per week. For weight management, this is your go-to.
tip.zh-TW: 在夏季濕氣最重的時候尤其有效。冬瓜皮一定要保留——那是養生功效最強的部分。這道清淡的湯品每週可飲用 3-4 次。體重管理首選這道湯。
tip.ja: Especially effectiveで夏るとき湿気はat its peak. Keep 冬 melon 肌 — it'smosttherapeutic part. This light スープ canであるconsumed 3-4倍per 週. For 体重 management, thisはyour go-to.

title.en: Hawthorn, Barley & Tangerine Peel Digestion Soup
title.ja: Hawthorn, Barley & T怒りine Peel Digestion Soup

tcmPrinciple.en: Hawthorn is the premier fat-digesting food in TCM — it specifically breaks down greasy, fatty foods and resolves food stagnation. Roasted barley supports the Spleen and drains dampness. Tangerine peel moves Qi. This is the «I ate too much greasy food" recovery soup — it helps your body process what it couldn't handle on its own.
tcmPrinciple.zh-TW: 山楂是中醫消脂化油的首選食材——專門化解油膩脂肪、消除食積。炒麥芽健脾祛濕，陳皮理氣行滯。這是一碗「吃太油了」的急救湯——幫助身體處理它自己消化不了的東西。
tcmPrinciple.ja: Hawthornはpremier 脂肪-digesting 食物で中医 — it specifically breaks down greasy, 脂肪ty 食物sとresolves 食物 stagnation. Roasted barley サポートs 脾と利s 湿気. T怒りine peel moves 気. Thisは«I ateもmuch greasy 食物" recovery スープ — it ヘルプs your 体 process何it couldn't 手le on its own.

steps.en: Rinse all herbs. Blanch pork ribs for 2 minutes. Rinse.
steps.zh-TW: 所有食材沖洗乾淨。豬排骨汆燙 2 分鐘後沖洗。
steps.ja: Rinse all herbs. Blanch pork ribsのために2 分s. Rinse.

steps.en: Place all ingredients in a pot with 1 liter of water. Bring to boil.
steps.zh-TW: 所有材料放入鍋中，加水 1 公升，大火煮開。
steps.ja: Placeすべて材料sでa potと共に1 literの水. Bringにboil.

steps.en: Simmer for 1 hour. The broth will be slightly sour from the hawthorn — this is normal and therapeutic.
steps.zh-TW: 轉小火煲 1 小時。湯汁會因為山楂而帶點微酸——這是正常的，也是養生功效的表現。
steps.ja: Simmerのために1 時間. The broth willであるslightly sourからhawthorn — thisはnormalとtherapeutic.

steps.en: Season with a pinch of salt. Drink the broth. The hawthorn can be eaten if desired.
steps.zh-TW: 加少許鹽調味。飲用湯汁。山楂果肉也可食用。
steps.ja: Seasonと共にa pinchのsalt. Drink broth. The hawthorn canである食べるen if desired.

tip.en: Best consumed after heavy meals, especially those with fried or greasy food. The slight sourness is the hawthorn's fat-dissolving action — don't mask it with sugar. Drink 2-3 times per week or after indulgent meals.
tip.zh-TW: 最適合在大餐後飲用，尤其是吃了油炸或油膩食物之後。那股微酸味正是山楂消脂的作用——不要加糖掩蓋它。每週飲用 2-3 次，或在大餐後飲用。
tip.ja: Best consumed後にheavy 食事s, especially thoseと共にfriedかgreasy 食物. The slight sournessはhawthorn's 脂肪-dissolving action— don't mask itと共にsugar. Drink 2-3倍per 週かafter indulgent 食事s.

title.en: Kelp, Tofu & Tangerine Peel De-Bloat Soup
title.ja: Kelp, Tofu & T怒りine Peel De-Bloat Soup

tcmPrinciple.en: Kelp is one of the most powerful phlegm-resolving foods in TCM — it softens hard masses, resolves phlegm, and drains dampness through urination. Tofu is light and easy to digest, generating no dampness. Tangerine peel moves Qi. White pepper warms the Spleen. This is a light, daily-use soup that gradually transforms phlegm without stressing the digestive system.
tcmPrinciple.zh-TW: 海帶是中醫最強的化痰食材之一——能軟堅散結、化痰祛濕、利水消腫。豆腐清淡易消化，不生濕氣。陳皮理氣，白胡椒溫脾。這是一道輕盈的日常湯品，能漸進式地化痰而不增加脾胃負擔。
tcmPrinciple.ja: Kelpはoneのmost powerful 痰-resolving 食物sで中医 — it softens硬いmasses, resolves 痰,と利s 湿気を通じてurination. Tofuはlightとeasyにdigest, generatingない湿気. T怒りine peel moves 気. White pepper 温めるs 脾. Thisはa light, daily-use スープ that gradually transforms 痰 없이ストレスing 消化器系.

steps.en: Soak dried kelp for 20 minutes until soft. Cut into strips.
steps.zh-TW: 乾海帶浸泡 20 分鐘至柔軟，切成條狀。
steps.ja: Soak dried kelpのために20 分sまでsoft. Cutにstrips.

steps.en: Cut tofu into cubes. Bring 1 liter of water to boil with ginger and tangerine peel.
steps.zh-TW: 豆腐切塊。生薑和陳皮加水 1 公升煮開。
steps.ja: Cut tofuにcubes. Bring 1 literの水にboilと共にgingerとt怒りine peel.

steps.en: Add kelp and simmer for 15 minutes.
steps.zh-TW: 加入海帶，小火煮 15 分鐘。
steps.ja: Add kelpとsimmerのために15 分s.

steps.en: Add tofu and cook 5 more minutes. Season with salt and white pepper.
steps.zh-TW: 加入豆腐再煮 5 分鐘，以鹽和白胡椒調味。
steps.ja: Add tofuと料理する 5 more 分s. Seasonと共にsaltとwhite pepper.

tip.en: A quick 30-minute soup safe for daily consumption. White pepper (not black) is important — it specifically warms the Spleen and resolves phlegm. Kelp is available at any Asian grocery store. Excellent for reducing facial puffiness and abdominal bloating.
tip.zh-TW: 30 分鐘即可完成的快手湯，適合每天飲用。白胡椒（不是黑胡椒）很重要——它專門溫脾化痰。海帶在任何亞洲超市都買得到。對消除面部浮腫和腹部脹滿非常有效。
tip.ja: A quick 30-分 スープ safeのためにdaily consumption. White pepper (not black)はimportant — it specifically 温めるs 脾とresolves 痰. Kelpはavailable atいくつかAsian grocery store. Excellentのためにreducing facial puffinessと腹部的 bloating.

tcmPrinciple.en: White radish (daikon) is the premier phlegm-resolving vegetable in TCM — it moves Qi downward, resolves food stagnation, and transforms phlegm. Combined with beef (which tonifies Spleen and Stomach Qi without generating as much dampness as pork), this is a satisfying, protein-rich soup that actively transforms phlegm while nourishing the Spleen.
tcmPrinciple.zh-TW: 白蘿蔔是中醫化痰的第一蔬菜——能下氣消食、化痰除脹。搭配牛肉（補脾胃之氣而不像豬肉那樣容易生濕），是一道飽足感十足的高蛋白湯品，既能化痰又能健脾。
tcmPrinciple.ja: White radish (daikon)はpremier 痰-resolving vegetableで中医 — it moves 気 downward, resolves 食物 stagnation,とtransforms 痰. Combinedと共にbeef (which tonifies 脾と胃 気 없이generating asたくさん湿気 as pork), thisはa satisfying, タンパク質-rich スープ that actively transforms 痰の間に滋養ing 脾.

steps.en: Blanch beef brisket in boiling water for 3 minutes. Cut into chunks. Rinse.
steps.zh-TW: 牛腩放入沸水中汆燙 3 分鐘，切塊後沖洗乾淨。
steps.ja: Blanch beef brisketでboiling 水のために3 分s. Cutにchunks. Rinse.

steps.en: Peel and cut white radish into large chunks.
steps.zh-TW: 白蘿蔔去皮切大塊。
steps.ja: Peelとcut white radishにlarge chunks.

steps.en: Place beef, ginger, and tangerine peel in a pot with 1.5 liters of water. Simmer for 1 hour.
steps.zh-TW: 牛肉、生薑和陳皮放入鍋中，加水 1.5 公升，小火煲 1 小時。
steps.ja: Place beef, ginger,とt怒りine peelでa potと共に1.5 litersの水. Simmerのために1 時間.

steps.en: Add white radish and cook 30 more minutes until both beef and radish are tender.
steps.zh-TW: 加入白蘿蔔再煮 30 分鐘，至牛肉和蘿蔔都軟爛入味。
steps.ja: Add white radishと料理する 30 more 分sまでboth beefとradishはtender.

steps.en: Season with salt and white pepper. The radish should be soft and translucent.
steps.zh-TW: 加鹽和白胡椒調味。蘿蔔應煮至軟透呈半透明狀。
steps.ja: Seasonと共にsaltとwhite pepper. The radish shouldであるsoftとtranslucent.

tip.en: A hearty, satisfying soup that doesn't feel like "diet food." The white radish is the medicine — eat it. Do not use red radish. This soup helps reduce abdominal fullness and improves digestion. Drink 2-3 times per week.
tip.zh-TW: 一道濃郁滿足的湯品，完全不像「減肥餐」。白蘿蔔才是主角——一定要吃掉。請勿使用紅皮蘿蔔。這道湯有助於減輕腹部脹滿、改善消化。每週飲用 2-3 次。
tip.ja: A h耳ty, satisfying スープ that doesn't感じるlike "食事 食物." The white radish is wellness — 食べる it. Doないuse red radish. This スープ ヘルプs 軽減 腹部的 fullnessと改善s digestion. Drink 2-3倍per 週.

title.en: Lotus Leaf, Hawthorn & Cassia Seed Weight Management Tea
title.zh-TW: 荷葉山楂決明子瘦身茶
title.ja: Lotus Leaf, Hawthorn & Cassia Seed Weight Management Tea

ch6Recipes.titleZh: 荷叶山楂决明子瘦身汤

tcmPrinciple.en: The classic TCM weight management formula in soup form. Lotus leaf «lifts» dampness and resolves fat accumulation. Hawthorn digests fat and resolves stagnation. Cassia seed clears Liver heat and promotes bowel movements (addressing the constipation that often accompanies dampness). Tangerine peel moves Qi. This formula targets the exact mechanism of Phlegm-Damp weight gain.
tcmPrinciple.zh-TW: 中醫經典的瘦身方劑，以湯茶形式呈現。荷葉升發清陽、消脂化濁，山楂消脂化積，決明子清肝明目並促進排便（改善濕氣常伴隨的便秘問題），陳皮理氣。這個方子精準針對痰濕質發胖的病機。
tcmPrinciple.ja: The classic 中医 体重 management formulaでスープ form. Lotus leaf «lifts» 湿気とresolves 脂肪 accumulation. Hawthorn digests 脂肪とresolves stagnation. Cassia seed 清s 肝 熱とpromotes bowel movements (addressing 便秘 thatしばしばaccompanies 湿気). T怒りine peel moves 気. This formula targets exact mechanismのPh足m-Damp 体重 gain.

steps.en: Lightly toast cassia seeds in a dry pan for 2 minutes until fragrant.
steps.zh-TW: 決明子放入乾鍋中微炒 2 分鐘至飄出香氣。
steps.ja: Lightly乾煎りcassia seedsでa乾燥したpanのために2 分sまでfragrant.

steps.en: Place all ingredients in 1 liter of water. Bring to boil.
steps.zh-TW: 所有材料放入 1 公升水中，大火煮開。
steps.ja: Placeすべて材料sで1 literの水. Bringにboil.

steps.en: Simmer for 20 minutes. Strain and drink the broth throughout the day.
steps.zh-TW: 轉小火煮 20 分鐘。過濾後全天代茶飲用。
steps.ja: Simmerのために20 分s. Strainと飲む broth throughout 日.

tip.en: This is more of a tea than a soup — drink it throughout the day between meals. Lotus leaf is available at Chinese herbal shops. Do not use if pregnant. Consume daily for 2-3 weeks, then take a 1-week break. You should notice reduced bloating within the first week.
tip.zh-TW: 這更像是一道茶飲而非湯品——在兩餐之間全天飲用。乾荷葉在中醫食材行可購得。孕婦請勿使用。連續飲用 2-3 週後休息一週。第一週應可感覺到腹脹減輕。
tip.ja: Thisはmoreのa お茶 than a スープ — 飲む it throughout 日の間に食事s. Lotus leafはavailable at Chinese herbal shops. Doないuse if pregnant. Consume dailyのために2-3 週s,その後take a 1-週 break. Youすべきnotice 軽減d bloating within最初の週.

title.en: Mung Bean, Coix Seed & Kelp Damp-Clearing Soup
title.ja: Mung Bean, Coix Seed & Kelp Damp-Cl耳ing Soup

tcmPrinciple.en: Mung beans clear heat and resolve damp-toxins. Coix seed drains dampness. Kelp resolves phlegm. Together they form a powerful heat-clearing, damp-draining, phlegm-resolving formula. This is especially effective for men whose dampness has started to generate heat (the «damp-heat» complication): body odor, sticky sweat, acne, irritability, and a feeling of being simultaneously heavy and hot.
tcmPrinciple.zh-TW: 綠豆清熱解毒利濕，薏米祛濕，海帶化痰。三者合用，形成強效的清熱祛濕化痰方。這道湯特別適合濕氣已經開始化熱的男性（即「濕熱」併發症）：體味重、汗液黏膩、長痘、煩躁易怒，以及一種又重又熱的感覺。
tcmPrinciple.ja: Mung beans 清 熱とresolve damp-toxins. Coix seed 利s 湿気. Kelp resolves 痰. Together theyforma powerful 熱-清ing, damp-利ing, 痰-resolving formula. Thisはespecially effectiveのためにmen誰の湿気持っているstartedにgenerate 熱 («damp-熱» complication): 体 odor, sticky sw食べる, 痘痘, 短気,とa feelingのbeing simultaneously heavyとhot.

steps.en: Roast coix seeds. Soak mung beans for 1 hour. Soak kelp for 20 minutes and cut into strips.
steps.zh-TW: 炒薏米備用。綠豆浸泡 1 小時。海帶浸泡 20 分鐘後切條。
steps.ja: Roast coix seeds. Soak mung beansのために1 時間. Soak kelpのために20 分sとcutにstrips.

steps.en: Blanch pork ribs for 2 minutes. Rinse.
steps.zh-TW: 豬排骨汆燙 2 分鐘後沖洗乾淨。
steps.ja: Blanch pork ribsのために2 分s. Rinse.

steps.en: Place all ingredients in 1.2 liters of water. Bring to boil.
steps.zh-TW: 所有材料放入 1.2 公升水中，大火煮開。
steps.ja: Placeすべて材料sで1.2 litersの水. Bringにboil.

steps.en: Simmer for 1 hour. Season with salt. Eat the beans and kelp.
steps.zh-TW: 轉小火煲 1 小時，加鹽調味。綠豆和海帶請一併食用。
steps.ja: Simmerのために1 時間. Seasonと共にsalt. Eat beansとkelp.

tip.en: Best for summer when damp-heat is most intense. Drink 2-3 times per week. If you don't have heat symptoms (no body odor, no acne), use less mung bean (15g) and more coix seed (40g). This soup helps with weight management and reduces the «heavy and hot» feeling.
tip.zh-TW: 最適合夏季濕熱最盛的時候飲用。每週 2-3 次。如果沒有熱象（無體味、無痘痘），可減少綠豆用量至 15 公克，增加薏米至 40 公克。這道湯有助於體重管理，減輕「又重又熱」的不適感。
tip.ja: Bestのために夏るときdamp-熱はmost intense. Drink 2-3倍per 週. If you don't持っている熱 症状s (no 体 odor,ない痘痘), use less mung bean (15g)とmore coix seed (40g). This スープ ヘルプsと共に体重 managementと軽減s «heavyとhot» feeling.

title.en: Chinese Yam, Poria & Chicken Daily Balance Soup
title.ja: Chinese Yam, Poria & Chicken Daily Balance Soup

tcmPrinciple.en: The most balanced daily soup for Phlegm-Damp types. Chinese yam tonifies Spleen Qi and stabilizes fluids without creating dampness (uniquely among tonics). Poria drains dampness while simultaneously strengthening the Spleen. Chicken provides nourishment. This soup addresses the root cause — a weak Spleen — while gently draining the accumulated dampness. A long-term daily foundation.
tcmPrinciple.zh-TW: 痰濕質最均衡的日常湯品。山藥補脾益氣、固攝水液，且獨具不生濕的優點（在補益藥中十分罕見）。茯苓健脾滲濕，雞肉溫補營養。這道湯從根本著手——補脾虛——同時溫和地排出累積的濕氣。適合長期日常飲用作為調理基礎。
tcmPrinciple.ja: Themostバランスd毎日のスープのためにPh足m-Damp types. Chinese yam tonifies 脾 気とstabilizes 津液 없이cr食べるing 湿気 (uniquelyの中でtonics). Poria 利s 湿気の間にsimultaneously 強化ing 脾. Chicken provides 滋養ment. This スープ addresses root原因— a weak 脾 —の間にgently 利ingaccumulated湿気. A long-term毎日のfoundation.

steps.en: Peel and cut Chinese yam into chunks (wear gloves). Blanch chicken thigh for 2 minutes.
steps.zh-TW: 山藥去皮切塊（建議戴手套操作）。雞腿汆燙 2 分鐘。
steps.ja: Peelとcut Chinese yamにchunks (w耳 gloves). Blanch chicken thighのために2 分s.

steps.en: Place chicken, poria, red dates, and ginger in a pot with 1 liter of water. Simmer for 45 minutes.
steps.zh-TW: 雞腿、茯苓、紅棗和生薑放入鍋中，加水 1 公升，小火煲 45 分鐘。
steps.ja: Place chicken, poria, red dates,とgingerでa potと共に1 literの水. Simmerのために45 分s.

steps.en: Add yam and cook 20 more minutes until soft. Season with salt.
steps.zh-TW: 加入山藥再煮 20 分鐘至軟爛，加鹽調味。
steps.ja: Add yamと料理する 20 more 分sまでsoft. Seasonと共にsalt.

tip.en: The most versatile soup in this collection — safe for daily use, family-friendly, and addresses the root cause. If you only make one soup regularly, make this one. Substitute dried yam slices (30g) if fresh is unavailable.
tip.zh-TW: 本系列中最百搭的湯品——適合日常飲用、全家共享，且從根本調理體質。如果只能選一道湯長期煲，就選這道。如無鮮山調養方法，可用乾山藥片 30 公克代替。
tip.ja: Themostversatile スープでthis collection — safeのためにdaily use, family-friendly,とaddresses root cause. If youのみmake one スープ regularly,作るthis one. Substitute dried yam slices (30g) if freshはunavailable.

footer.en: Sweat is your medicine. Move enough to sweat daily — it physically expels dampness. Avoid dairy, sweets, and fried foods strictly. Every heavy meal sets you back. Every workout moves you forward.
footer.zh-TW: 出汗就是你的好幫手。每天運動到出汗的程度——汗水能實質性地排出濕氣。嚴格忌口乳製品、甜食和油炸食物。每一頓大魚大肉都在拖後腿，每一次運動都在幫你前進。
footer.ja: Sweating is your wellness. Move enoughにsw食べる毎日の— it physically expels 湿気. Avoid dairy, sweets,とfried 食物s strictly. Every heavy 食事 sets you 背中. Every 仕事out moves you forward.

footer.en: Rate energy and sleep 1-5 (1=worst, 5=best). Track bloating, tongue coating, and sweat quality in Body Notes. Weight weekly — weigh yourself every Sunday morning. First changes in energy by Day 7, weight by Day 14.
footer.zh-TW: 精力和睡眠以 1-5 分評量（1=最差，5=最佳）。在「身體觀察」欄位記錄腹脹、舌苔和出汗狀況。每週量一次體重——每週日早晨固定測量。預計第 7 天開始感覺精力改善，第 14 天起體重開始變化。
footer.ja: Rate 精力と睡眠 1-5 (1=worst, 5=best). Track bloating, 舌 coating,とsw食べる qualityでBody Notes. Weight 週ly — weigh yourself毎Sun日 朝. First changesで精力によるDay 7, 体重によるDay 14.
